confidence_notes: Recent graduate (May 2024) with 3 months of internship experience and 2 completed projects. All skills extracted from demonstrated work experience, internship responsibilities, and project implementations. No speculative or aspirational skills included.

projects.name: InternTracker — Job Application Tracker
projects.summary: Full-stack SaaS application for tracking job applications with authentication, drag-and-drop Kanban board, and automated email reminders. Deployed to AWS EC2 and live at interntracker.io. Achieved 500+ registered users within 2 weeks of launch and won Best Solo Hack at HackUCLA 2024.

projects.name: PricePulse — E-Commerce Price Monitor
projects.summary: Automated price monitoring system using Python web scraper deployed on AWS Lambda as a cron job. Monitors 3,000+ product listings daily, sends email alerts for price drops >15%, and handles 10,000+ requests per day with Redis caching optimization.

impact_highlights.description: Optimized React dashboard at FinanceApp Inc. through code-splitting and lazy loading of chart components, significantly improving user experience for production application.
impact_highlights.metric: 1.8 seconds reduction in page load time (from 3.2s to 1.4s)

impact_highlights.description: Enhanced database performance at FinanceApp Inc. by adding composite indexes to slow PostgreSQL queries, improving query execution efficiency.
impact_highlights.metric: 62% reduction in average query time (from 850ms to 320ms)

impact_highlights.description: Deployed InternTracker SaaS application to production on AWS EC2 with live domain, achieving rapid user adoption.
impact_highlights.metric: 500+ registered users within 2 weeks of launch

impact_highlights.description: Won competitive hackathon award for InternTracker solo project at HackUCLA 2024.
Deployed PricePulse scraper on AWS Lambda handling high-volume daily monitoring with optimized caching strategy.
impact_highlights.metric: 10,000+ requests per day; 80% reduction in repeat API calls via Redis caching

impact_highlights.description: Shipped production feature at FinanceApp Inc. serving substantial user base with optimized performance.
